new_episodes.title: New episodes
new_episodes.subtitle: Notify me when a new episode airs for an anime in my list

app_update.title: Notify about updates
app_update.subtitle: Show a notification when a new Kiriha version is available

delay.title: Notification delay
delay.subtitle: How many minutes after detection to show the toast (0 — immediately)

grid_view.title: Grid View
grid_view.subtitle: Display list as cards with posters

shikimori.duplicate_marks_sub: Sync progress and scores to Shikimori
shikimori.russian_titles_sub: Additionally show Russian title alongside from Shikimori (does not replace original title)
shikimori.russian_descriptions_sub: Replace English descriptions with Shikimori's version (if available)
shikimori.other_mirror_active: Disconnect the other Shikimori mirror first
shikimori.one_sub: The original site — recommended for most users
shikimori.net_sub: Fan fork of the Shikimori project
shikimori.exclusive_notice: You can connect only one Shikimori variant at a time — either the original or the fork. Disconnect the current one to switch.
shikimori.fork_domains_tooltip: The fork is served from multiple domains (shikimori.rip, .net, .fi, …) to circumvent regional blocking. The app figures out the working one automatically — including new domains we don't know about yet.

airing_info.title: Airing Information
airing_info.subtitle: Show number of aired episodes and countdown to the next one

launch_minimized.title: Launch Minimized
launch_minimized.subtitle: Launch in system tray on Windows startup

discord.title: Discord Rich Presence
discord.subtitle: Show current anime in your Discord status

tray.close_to_tray_sub: Hide to tray instead of closing
tray.minimize_to_tray_sub: Hide to tray when window is minimized

updates.download_in_background_sub: Automatically download updates and only prompt to restart

cache.title: Cache
cache.subtitle: Clear temporary data without touching your list, accounts, or app settings.

custom_links.title: My Links
custom_links.help_body:
Added links show up as buttons next to MAL and Shiki on the anime details card
and in the Now Playing panel.

Enter a URL template — the placeholders below are replaced with the current anime's data
and URL-encoded automatically.

The icon is pulled from the site's favicon automatically; if that fails the default globe stays.
